evidence_rows.evidence: Fixture records stale and current public source timestamps without contacting the network.
Fixture compares prior_hash and candidate_hash values from deterministic metadata only.
Fixture records redirect-chain deltas from replay metadata, not from a live request.
Fixture records policy skip and denial decisions for unsupported or disallowed URLs.
Fixture records processor handoff failures and the fallback disposition.
Fixture confirms no raw response body is persisted in committed artifacts.
Fixture identifies candidate requirement and guardrail impacts for reviewer triage.
Fixture records reviewer hold criteria before any promotion or release decision.
Fixture records deterministic retry counts and backoff windows without executing requests.
Fixture lists validation commands as string arrays for offline packet checks.
